english: What is Article 370, and what was its significance in the Indian Constitution?
hindi: क्या है आर्टिकल 370, और इसका भारतीय संविधान में क्या महत्व था?
tamil: என்ன ஆர்டிக்கிள் 370, மற்றும் இதன் பயன்பாடு இந்திய அரசியலமைப்பில் என்ன?
vietnamese: Điều khoản 370 là gì, và nó có ý nghĩa gì trong Hiến pháp Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: Article 370 was a constitutional provision that granted special status to the state of Jammu and Kashmir in India. It was abrogated on August 5, 2019.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating the date of abrogation or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about the topic.
